clusters.justification: These terms reliably co-activate within insular-amygdala and anterior cingulate networks, reflecting the overarching macroscopic axis of interoceptive arousal, emotional valence, and mood state.
Mapping onto cortico-striatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways, this domain represents the generalized computation of subjective utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed motivational drive.

Anchored functionally within the medial prefrontal and temporoparietal hubs of internally directed large-scale networks, this axis subsumes complex representations of the self, social agents, and interpersonal dynamics.
